results.score_rule: mean of feature and feature_scale patch L2-norm maps; image score is top-k mean
results.adpretrain_training: not_run; official CLIP-B16 projected residual feature cache is reused
notes: This is a no-AHL baseline from the same feature cache used by plain AHL.
Scores do not use stage labels; stages are repeated for table alignment with AHL.
Precision/Recall/F1 use the same fixed-test best-F1 policy as the AHL train/test-only reports.
